name: claude-prophet
description: Claude-native Prophet Hacks forecasting harness with local market, sports, finance, Kalshi, and validation tools.

scripts.setup: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.sample:retrieve:sports: mkdir -p sample_events && .venv/bin/prophet forecast retrieve --dataset sample-sports -o sample_events/sample-sports.json
scripts.sample:retrieve:entertainment: mkdir -p sample_events && .venv/bin/prophet forecast retrieve --dataset sample-entertainment -o sample_events/sample-entertainment.json
scripts.sample:retrieve:economics: mkdir -p sample_events && .venv/bin/prophet forecast retrieve --dataset sample-economics -o sample_events/sample-economics.json
scripts.sample:retrieve:resolved: mkdir -p sample_events && .venv/bin/prophet forecast retrieve --dataset sample-resolved --include-resolved -o sample_events/sample-resolved.json
scripts.test:tools: .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests/test_kalshi_discovery.py tests/test_sports_lookup.py tests/test_finance_lookup.py tests/test_market_lookup.py tests/test_company_fundamentals.py && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_submit_prediction.py tests/test_api_service_fallback.py tests/test_run_metadata.py tests/test_forecast_launcher.py tests/test_openrouter_fallback.py tests/test_openclaw_observer.py
scripts.check: command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'claude CLI not found. Install with: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code'; exit 1; } && .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests/test_kalshi_discovery.py tests/test_sports_lookup.py tests/test_finance_lookup.py tests/test_market_lookup.py tests/test_company_fundamentals.py && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_submit_prediction.py tests/test_api_service_fallback.py tests/test_run_metadata.py tests/test_forecast_launcher.py tests/test_openrouter_fallback.py tests/test_openclaw_observer.py
